objections.title: Objection — Not Trusted
objections.message: that's so good elli je fi mo5ek souel heda w kol wa7ed 9bal ma y7ot flousou y7eb ykoun sur. El trading mech madhmoun bel flous barcha 3bed bda w khasrou flous mech 3la khater trading sa3ib, 3la khater 9a3din yet3allmou b ghelt min youtube and fake courses so lezem tal9a trusted recourse w tkoun fi el sekka el s7i7a w tri9 s7i7 — tal9a kol chay 3la tunisiantopgs.com — w enti moujoud lenna 3ala heda walle ? 🎯
